variants.title: Source traceability
variants.instruction: Find product ideas, requirements, scope items, domain rules or deliverables that lack traceability to source materials, market references or recorded product decisions.

variants.title: Scope and boundary
variants.instruction: Find places where vision, feature catalog, roadmap, release scope, domain spec, acceptance criteria or deliverables overreach their documented responsibility.

variants.title: Decision and question gates
variants.instruction: Find unresolved questions, proposed decisions, ambiguous domain behavior or scope choices that should block release readiness or delivery handoff.

variants.title: Handoff readiness
variants.instruction: Find deliverables that are too broad, too task-like, missing source docs, missing acceptance links or not ready for delivery implementation.

lenses.title: Doctrine vs spec tree
lenses.focus: Compare generated product specs against the product-shaping README, file contracts, creation order, utilization order and precedence rules.

lenses.title: Release source of truth
lenses.focus: Compare SCOPE.md, DOMAIN_SPEC.md, ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.md and DELIVERABLES.md for contradiction, omission and scope drift.

lenses.title: Product decision integrity
lenses.focus: Compare OPEN_QUESTIONS.md and PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md against generated specs to ensure open questions remain visible and closed decisions are explicit.

lenses.title: Delivery handoff
lenses.focus: Evaluate whether DELIVERABLES.md is the only implementation handoff, contains valid statuses and avoids task-level implementation detail.
